text: Here, at the threshold of a modern, quiet knowledge center, I feel a sense of calm curiosity—clean lines and glass suggest transparency, progress, and potential. Entering deeper into this enigmatic space, I find myself in front of vibrant walls celebrating 'R + D'—research and development—a shrine to intellect and innovation. Surrounded by the material manifestations of inquiry, I am aware of the endless cycle of learning and unlearning, inspired by how humanity ceaselessly seeks to outdo itself. This place compels me to reflect on my own place in the arc of progress, at once a humble questioner and a hopeful contributor.
